title: Add gossip pub-sub realtime source to kanbus_clock
description: Experiment with kbs gossip watch --print event stream and integrate it into demos/kanbus_clock.py so notifications are driven by realtime pub-sub updates instead of poll-only detection.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started: capturing gossip stream format and then integrating it into kanbus_clock runtime.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Integrated gossip realtime source into kanbus_clock. Added --event-source (default gossip), gossip broker/watch lifecycle, issue.mutated envelope classification (issue_created/state_transition/comment_added), and in-memory issue snapshot cache so summarize_event can resolve from stream data. Validated with live run: comment, create, and transition events were consumed from gossip and queued with push-left transitions.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing multi-project gossip fan-out and --theme auto|dark|light across cards + React clock runtime, then running py_compile and test_kanbus_clock.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented: multi-project gossip fan-out under --root (one watcher per discovered .kanbus.yml project), global envelope dedupe, theme system (--theme auto|dark|light) for card colors + React clock query, and fail-fast when no Kanbus roots are found for gossip mode. Validation: py_compile ok, pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py => 50 passed, npm run build-pixoo-runtime ok.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adding periodic system-theme recheck for --theme auto so kanbus_clock switches live with OS light/dark changes.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented periodic system-theme recheck in kanbus_clock (auto mode). Added --theme-check-seconds (default 60s), live theme switching for React clock scene + card colors, and tests. Validation: py_compile passes and tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (52) passing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Observed on device: switching macOS to light mode did not update quickly. Tightening auto-theme monitor cadence and first-check timing, then restarting kanbus_clock for verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented + validated: auto-theme now rechecks every 5s (first check within ~2s), React clock scene live-updates theme, tests passing (53). Restarted kanbus_clock on device with --theme auto.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Committed and pushed: 6763234 (experiment/react-kanbus-clock). Includes auto-theme monitor defaults (5s), fast initial check, live React clock theme switching, and tests passing.
